title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server that lets you pull, run, and manage large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and list models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same generate/chat/embed API surface as the Python lib.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama models as LLMs and embedders for chains, agents, RAG, etc.

title: ollama-webui (formerly ollama-web)
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama with multi-model chats, code highlighting, RAG, admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; generate, chat, pull models, and handle streaming responses idiomatically on the JVM.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; simple generate/chat interface with blocks for streaming.

title: ollama-cli (community)
summary: Community-enhanced CLI with interactive chat, conversation history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into the editor as inline Copilot-style assistants.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-chatbot (React)
summary: Minimal React chatbot example that streams responses from a local Ollama server via the JS client.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C#/.NET client for Ollama with async streaming and strongly-typed request/response models.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up an Ollama service container for CI pipelines needing local LLM calls.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Lightweight retrieval-augmented-generation repo combining Ollama embeddings + Chroma + LangChain for PDF Q&A.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim client library for Ollama with async HTTP, streaming, and model management utilities.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration offering OllamaGenerator and OllamaTextEmbedder nodes for building LLM pipelines.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Official Rust crate providing typed async wrappers over the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server that exposes Ollama models as tools for Claude Desktop and other MCP clients.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local Ollama models for note Q&A, summarization, and inline text generation.

title: ollama-sdks
summary: Meta-repository tracking community SDKs for Go, PHP, Swift, Dart, Elixir and more.
